ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Description of the test method */,
  "obtained_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was obtained or approved */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the test expires or needs re-certification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "responsible_ia_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual responsible for the test method */,
  "tester_certified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tester is certified for this method */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the test */,
  "quality_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality standard applicable to this test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_responsible_ia_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_ia_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_quality_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_standard_id") REFERENCES quality_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the individual */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the individual (e.g., Manager, Tester) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test method for which this certification is valid */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was granted */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certification is set to expire */,
  "certified_by" TEXT /* Name of the individual or authority that granted the certification */,
  "certification_document" TEXT /* File path to the certification document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the status indicates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test method the result is associated with */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value obtained from the test */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result value */,
  "test_batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch of tests this result belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_batch_id") REFERENCES test_batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test batch */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test method being conducted */,
  "batch_date" TEXT /* Date when the test batch was processed */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Number of tests included in this batch */,
  "batch_status" TEXT /* Status of the batch (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_batches_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test method that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the individual who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of what was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_audit_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type (e.g., Chemical, Physical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality standard (e.g., ISO 9001) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_standard_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test method being checked */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality standard being checked */,
  "is_compliant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the test is compliant with the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_standard_compliance_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_standard_compliance_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES quality_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test method associated with the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification is created */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Expiration, Re-certification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_notifications_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result associated with this report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Summary, Detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test method being reviewed */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text content of the feedback */,
  "submitted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the individual who submitted the feedback */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_feedback_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lims_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test method integrated with LIMS */,
  "lims_system" TEXT /* Name of the LIMS system integrated */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the integration was made */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lims_integration_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Manager, Tester) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_roles" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "role_id")
)
